summary: Completed comprehensive testing of refactored OEC Tech Institute backend (from single 1400-line server.py to modular files). All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/courses returns array of published courses (8 courses)
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks returns array of diploma tracks
Backend: GET /api/reviews returns array of reviews
Backend: GET /api/courses/{course_id} returns course with weeks array
Backend: GET /api/courses/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with correct password returns session token
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard statistics (requires auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/assignments returns submissions with original_filename field
Backend: GET /api/admin/students returns array of students
Backend: GET /api/admin/enrollments returns array of enrollments
Backend: GET /api/admin/defaulters returns array of defaulters
Backend: GET /api/admin/diploma-enrollments returns array of diploma enrollments
Backend: GET /api/admin/admission-forms returns array of admission forms
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses returns courses with enrollment_count and approved_count
Backend: GET /api/admin/messages returns array of contact messages
Backend: PUT /api/admin/assignments/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/contact accepts contact message
Backend: POST /api/student/upload without auth returns 401/422
Backend: GET /api/files/nonexistent returns 404
Frontend: Home page loads correctly with OEC Tech branding
Frontend: Courses page loads with 8 course cards
Frontend: Admin login works with correct password
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows stats (8 courses, 4 students, 7 enrollments)
Frontend: Admin sidebar has 8 navigation items (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments, Admissions, Diploma, Defaulters, Assignments)
Frontend: All admin pages accessible after login (Dashboard, Courses, Students, Payments, Admissions, Diploma, Defaulters, Assignments)
Frontend: Admin Assignments page shows filter tabs (All, Pending, Approved, Rejected) with counts
Frontend: Admin Assignments page has search input
Frontend: Admin Assignments View modal shows student info, course/week, submission content, status, feedback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested the refactored backend (from single server.py to modular files: database.py, models.py, auth.py, routes/auth_routes.py, routes/course_routes.py, routes/admin_routes.py, routes/general_routes.py). All API endpoints preserved and working. Key improvements verified: 1) MongoDB indexes created at startup, 2) Student file upload limit 10MB, 3) File download includes Content-Disposition header with original filename, 4) Admin assignments API includes original_filename field. All 8 admin pages accessible. Email notifications are MOCKED (logs to console).

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)
